resource_reporting.reason: wall time and RSS are host-dependent; exact operation counts are persisted in each census and external profiling does not alter output

incident_cache_full_scan_equivalence.scope: every-deduplicated terminal parent and both children of each parent's deterministic minimum-child pair; exhaustive child equivalence is covered by the finite fixture test

maximum_drop_breadcrumb.reason: a difference of two lower-envelope values has no monotonic relationship to the unavailable native-state drop

monotonic_no_crossing_scope.reason: omitted backtrack removals retain stale observed assignments; extra assignments cannot increase a grouped upper bound, so U_visible_envelope <= U_native for the same child under the archived complete-assignment-notification contract
monotonic_no_crossing_scope.scope: 549 serialized nonzero proposal markers from O1C-0079 only; not the 1038 zero-return callbacks and not the future Page-7 run

visible_event_lower_envelope.pair_ledger_storage_rule: canonical rows hashed in event/callback then ascending-key order; only extrema and aggregate counters persisted to keep the artifact bounded
visible_event_lower_envelope.state_rule: replay assignment notifications; ignore same-sign renotifications as v6; replace an incompatible stale sign on its later notification; unwind only the eight serialized release batches; validate convergence to terminal cache
visible_event_lower_envelope.warning: The 549 replay states are lower-envelope reconstructions, not exact same-parent callback assignments. Missing backtrack targets prevent exact replay.
